message.content: 基于以下已知事实，只做规划，不写代码：LFP2D 世界地图里已有城镇建筑传送阵占位能力，但未实现。已确认：1) `Source/LFP2D/Town/LFPTownData.h` 有 `TBT_Teleport` 和 `TeleportTargetNodeIDs`；2) `Source/LFP2D/UI/Town/LFPTownWidget.cpp` 已有 `OnTeleportClicked` 事件；3) `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerController.cpp` 在 `OnTownBuildingRequested` 的 `TBT_Teleport` 分支仍是 TODO；4) 世界地图移动/进入节点链路集中在 `LFPWorldMapPlayerController` 与 `LFPWorldMapManager`；5) 已有世界地图快照保存/恢复。请输出一份简洁但具体的实现计划，目标是先实现“城镇内传送阵功能”，不要扩展成独立传送阵节点，优先复用现有 TownBuilding / Widget / Manager / PlayerState 模式。需要说明：推荐修改哪些类与函数、数据如何从城镇节点传到传送 UI、执行传送时应该由哪个类负责更新当前位置/迷雾/节点进入状态、需要哪些蓝图或 UMG 配合、以及端到端验证步骤。控制在 300 词内。

content.thinking:
**Planning for user response**

It seems I need to respond in Chinese and gather information, but I shouldn't include pages parameters. I’m thinking of using a plan file, but the system says writing isn’t allowed. So I'll focus on gathering info using Read and possibly Grep for specific functions or classes. The user wants a concise plan under 300 Chinese words, which might mean around 250-350 characters. I’ll inspect relevant headers to keep it concise. Let's get started!

1	#pragma once
2	
3	#include "CoreMinimal.h"
4	#include "GameFramework/Actor.h"
5	#include "LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapData.h"
6	#include "LFPWorldMapManager.generated.h"
7	
8	class ALFPWorldMapNode;
9	class ALFPWorldMapEdge;
10	class ALFPWorldMapPawn;
11	class ULFPWorldNodeDataAsset;
12	class ULFPWorldMapPlayerState;
13	class UPaperSprite;
14	
15	UCLASS()
16	class LFP2D_API ALFPWorldMapManager : public AActor
17	{
18		GENERATED_BODY()
19	
20	public:
21		ALFPWorldMapManager();
22	
23	protected:
24		virtual void BeginPlay() override;
25	
26	public:
27		// ============== 节点管理 ==============
28	
29		// 生成节点
30		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
31		ALFPWorldMapNode* SpawnNode(int32 NodeID, FVector2D Position, ELFPWorldNodeType NodeType);
32	
33		// 移除节点（同时移除关联边）
34		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
35		bool RemoveNode(int32 NodeID);
36	
37		// 按 ID 查找节点
38		UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "World Map")
39		ALFPWorldMapNode* GetNode(int32 NodeID) const;
40	
41		// 获取节点的所有邻居
42		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
43		TArray<ALFPWorldMapNode*> GetNeighbors(int32 NodeID) const;
44	
45		// 生成下一个可用 NodeID
46		UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "World Map")
47		int32 GetNextNodeID() const;
48	
49		// ============== 边管理 ==============
50	
51		// 添加边
52		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
53		ALFPWorldMapEdge* AddEdge(int32 FromID, int32 ToID, int32 TurnCost = 1);
54	
55		// 移除边
56		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
57		bool RemoveEdge(int32 FromID, int32 ToID);
58	
59		// 获取两节点之间的边
60		UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "World Map")
61		ALFPWorldMapEdge* GetEdge(int32 FromID, int32 ToID) const;
62	
63		// ============== 地图操作 ==============
64	
65		// 清除所有节点和边
66		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
67		void ClearMap();
68	
69		// ============== CSV 保存/加载 ==============
70	
71		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
72		bool SaveWorldMap(const FString& MapName);
73	
74		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
75		bool LoadWorldMap(const FString& MapName);
76	
77		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
78		TArray<FString> GetSavedWorldMapList();
79	
80		// ============== 导出数据 ==============
81	
82		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
83		TArray<FLFPWorldNodeRow> ExportNodeData() const;
84	
85		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
86		TArray<FLFPWorldEdgeRow> ExportEdgeData() const;
87	
88		// ============== 只读引用 ==============
89	
90		const TMap<int32, ALFPWorldMapNode*>& GetNodeMap() const { return NodeMap; }
91		const TMap<FIntPoint, ALFPWorldMapEdge*>& GetEdgeMap() const { return EdgeMap; }
92	
93		// ============== 视觉注册表 ==============
94	
95		// 获取节点类型对应的视觉数据
96		UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "World Map")
97		ULFPWorldNodeDataAsset* GetNodeVisualForType(ELFPWorldNodeType NodeType) const;
98	
99		// ============== 迷雾系统 ==============
100	
101		// 更新迷雾状态（根据玩家位置 BFS 揭开节点）
102		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map|Fog")
103		void UpdateFog();
104	
105		// 获取从指定节点出发、图距离不超过 MaxDistance 的所有节点
106		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map|Fog")
107		TSet<int32> GetNodesWithinGraphDistance(int32 StartNodeID, int32 MaxDistance) const;
108	
109		// ============== 玩家状态 ==============
110	
111		// 获取玩家状态
112		UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "World Map")
113		ULFPWorldMapPlayerState* GetPlayerState() const { return PlayerState; }
114	
115		// 初始化玩家（设置起始节点并更新迷雾）
116		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
117		void InitializePlayer(int32 StartNodeID);
118	
119		// 移动玩家到相邻节点
120		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
121		bool MovePlayer(int32 TargetNodeID);
122	
123		// 获取当前加载的世界地图名
124		UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "World Map")
125		FString GetCurrentWorldMapName() const { return CurrentWorldMapName; }
126	
127		// 设置当前世界地图名
128		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
129		void SetCurrentWorldMapName(const FString& MapName) { CurrentWorldMapName = MapName; }
130	
131		// 从快照恢复运行时状态（已触发节点）
132		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
133		void RestoreTriggeredNodes(const TSet<int32>& TriggeredNodeIDs);
134	
135		// 棋子是否正在移动中
136		UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "World Map")
137		bool IsPawnMoving() const;
138	
139		// 获取玩家棋子
140		UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "World Map")
141		ALFPWorldMapPawn* GetPlayerPawn() const { return PlayerPawn; }
142	
143	protected:
144		// 节点注册表：NodeID → Node Actor
145		UPROPERTY()
146		TMap<int32, ALFPWorldMapNode*> NodeMap;
147	
148		// 边注册表：EdgeKey → Edge Actor（EdgeKey = MakeEdgeKey(From, To)）
149		UPROPERTY()
150		TMap<FIntPoint, ALFPWorldMapEdge*> EdgeMap;
151	
152		// 邻接表：NodeID → 相邻 NodeID 集合
153		TMap<int32, TSet<int32>> AdjacencyList;
154	
155		// 节点 → 关联的 EdgeKey 列表（用于删除节点时清理边）
156		TMap<int32, TArray<FIntPoint>> NodeEdgeIndex;
157	
158		// Node Actor 子类（蓝图中配置）
159		UPROPERTY(EditDefaultsOnly, Category = "World Map")
160		TSubclassOf<ALFPWorldMapNode> NodeActorClass;
161	
162		// Edge Actor 子类（蓝图中配置）
163		UPROPERTY(EditDefaultsOnly, Category = "World Map")
164		TSubclassOf<ALFPWorldMapEdge> EdgeActorClass;
165	
166		// 节点类型视觉注册表（蓝图中配置）
167		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map|Registry")
168		TMap<ELFPWorldNodeType, TObjectPtr<ULFPWorldNodeDataAsset>> NodeVisualRegistry;
169	
170		// 边精灵（所有边共用，蓝图中配置）
171		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map|Registry")
172		TObjectPtr<UPaperSprite> EdgeSprite;
173	
174		// 迷雾视野范围（图距离，经过几条边）
175		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map|Fog")
176		int32 FogVisionRange = 2;
177	
178		// 玩家状态
179		UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "World Map")
180		TObjectPtr<ULFPWorldMapPlayerState> PlayerState;
181	
182		// 玩家棋子类（蓝图中配置）
183		UPROPERTY(EditDefaultsOnly, Category = "World Map|Pawn")
184		TSubclassOf<ALFPWorldMapPawn> PawnActorClass;
185	
186		// 玩家棋子实例
187		UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "World Map|Pawn")
188		TObjectPtr<ALFPWorldMapPawn> PlayerPawn;
189	
190		// ID 计数器
191		int32 NextNodeID = 0;
192	
193		// 当前世界地图名
194		FString CurrentWorldMapName;
195	
196		// 世界地图保存目录
197		FString GetWorldMapSaveDirectory() const;
198	
199		// 生成无向边的统一 Key（始终 Min, Max）
200		static FIntPoint MakeEdgeKey(int32 A, int32 B);
201	
202	private:
203		// CSV 读写辅助
204		bool SaveNodesToCSV(const FString& FilePath);
205		bool SaveEdgesToCSV(const FString& FilePath);
206		bool LoadNodesFromCSV(const FString& FilePath);
207		bool LoadEdgesFromCSV(const FString& FilePath);
208	
209		// 棋子移动完成回调
210		UFUNCTION()
211		void OnPawnMoveComplete();
212	
213		// 移动完成后执行迷雾更新和节点事件
214		void HandlePostMove(int32 TargetNodeID);
215	
216		// 缓存的目标节点 ID（棋子移动期间保存）
217		int32 PendingMoveTargetNodeID = -1;
218	};
219

1	#pragma once
2	
3	#include "CoreMinimal.h"
4	#include "Blueprint/UserWidget.h"
5	#include "LFP2D/Town/LFPTownData.h"
6	#include "LFPTownWidget.generated.h"
7	
8	class UButton;
9	class UTextBlock;
10	
11	DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE(FOnTownWidgetClosed);
12	DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnTownBuildingRequested, ELFPTownBuildingType, BuildingType);
13	
14	/**
15	 * 城镇面板 UI Widget
16	 * 建筑按钮和图片在 UMG 蓝图中预先配置好布局
17	 * Setup 时根据城镇拥有的建筑列表控制各按钮的可见性
18	 */
19	UCLASS()
20	class LFP2D_API ULFPTownWidget : public UUserWidget
21	{
22		GENERATED_BODY()
23	
24	public:
25		// 根据城镇建筑类型列表，显示/隐藏对应按钮
26		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Town")
27		void Setup(const TArray<ELFPTownBuildingType>& AvailableBuildings);
28	
29		// 关闭委托
30		UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable)
31		FOnTownWidgetClosed OnClosed;
32	
33		// 建筑功能请求委托（由 PlayerController 监听并分发）
34		UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable)
35		FOnTownBuildingRequested OnBuildingRequested;
36	
37	protected:
38		virtual void NativeOnInitialized() override;
39	
40	private:
41		// 各建筑按钮点击回调
42		UFUNCTION() void OnShopClicked();
43		UFUNCTION() void OnEvolutionTowerClicked();
44		UFUNCTION() void OnTeleportClicked();
45		UFUNCTION() void OnQuestNPCClicked();
46		UFUNCTION() void OnSkillNodeClicked();
47	
48		// 点击关闭
49		UFUNCTION() void OnCloseClicked();
50	
51		// 隐藏所有建筑按钮
52		void HideAllBuildings();
53	
54	protected:
55		// ==== BindWidget 控件（在 UMG 蓝图中预先配置好图片和布局） ====
56	
57		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, meta = (BindWidgetOptional))
58		TObjectPtr<UTextBlock> Text_TownName;
59	
60		// 商店
61		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, meta = (BindWidgetOptional))
62		TObjectPtr<UButton> Button_Shop;
63	
64		// 升华塔
65		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, meta = (BindWidgetOptional))
66		TObjectPtr<UButton> Button_EvolutionTower;
67	
68		// 传送阵
69		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, meta = (BindWidgetOptional))
70		TObjectPtr<UButton> Button_Teleport;
71	
72		// 任务NPC
73		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, meta = (BindWidgetOptional))
74		TObjectPtr<UButton> Button_QuestNPC;
75	
76		// 技能节点
77		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, meta = (BindWidgetOptional))
78		TObjectPtr<UButton> Button_SkillNode;
79	
80		// 关闭按钮
81		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, meta = (BindWidgetOptional))
82		TObjectPtr<UButton> Button_Close;
83	};
84

1	#pragma once
2	
3	#include "CoreMinimal.h"
4	#include "UObject/NoExportTypes.h"
5	#include "LFPWorldMapPlayerState.generated.h"
6	
7	class ALFPWorldMapManager;
8	class ALFPWorldMapNode;
9	
10	DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_TwoParams(FOnWorldMapTurnChanged, int32, CurrentTurn, int32, TurnBudget);
11	DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnPlayerNodeChanged, ALFPWorldMapNode*, NewNode);
12	
13	/**
14	 * 世界地图玩家状态：追踪位置、回合消耗、访问/揭露节点
15	 * 由 WorldMapManager 持有
16	 */
17	UCLASS(Blueprintable, BlueprintType)
18	class LFP2D_API ULFPWorldMapPlayerState : public UObject
19	{
20		GENERATED_BODY()
21	
22	public:
23		// 当前所在节点 ID
24		UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "World Map")
25		int32 CurrentNodeID = 0;
26	
27		// 已消耗的总回合数
28		UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "World Map")
29		int32 CurrentTurn = 0;
30	
31		// 回合压力阈值（超过后全局难度递增）
32		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
33		int32 TurnPressureThreshold = 100;
34	
35		// 已访问节点集合
36		UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "World Map")
37		TSet<int32> VisitedNodeIDs;
38	
39		// 已揭露节点集合（永久可见）
40		UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "World Map")
41		TSet<int32> RevealedNodeIDs;
42	
43		// ============== 方法 ==============
44	
45		// 移动到相邻节点（验证边存在、消耗回合、更新位置）
46		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
47		bool MoveToNode(int32 TargetNodeID, ALFPWorldMapManager* Manager);
48	
49		// 获取从当前节点出发的可达节点 ID 列表
50		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
51		TArray<int32> GetReachableNodeIDs(ALFPWorldMapManager* Manager) const;
52	
53		// 是否超过压力阈值
54		UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "World Map")
55		bool IsPastPressureThreshold() const { return CurrentTurn >= TurnPressureThreshold; }
56	
57		// 初始化（设置起始节点）
58		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
59		void Initialize(int32 StartNodeID);
60	
61		// ============== 委托 ==============
62	
63		UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable)
64		FOnWorldMapTurnChanged OnTurnChanged;
65	
66		UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable)
67		FOnPlayerNodeChanged OnPlayerNodeChanged;
68	};
69

1	#pragma once
2	
3	#include "CoreMinimal.h"
4	#include "GameFramework/Actor.h"
5	#include "LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapData.h"
6	#include "LFPWorldMapNode.generated.h"
7	
8	class UPaperSpriteComponent;
9	class UPaperSprite;
10	class ULFPWorldNodeDataAsset;
11	
12	UCLASS()
13	class LFP2D_API ALFPWorldMapNode : public AActor
14	{
15		GENERATED_BODY()
16	
17	public:
18		ALFPWorldMapNode();
19	
20		// ============== 节点数据 ==============
21	
22		// 节点 ID
23		UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "World Node")
24		int32 NodeID = -1;
25	
26		// 节点类型
27		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Node")
28		ELFPWorldNodeType NodeType = ELFPWorldNodeType::WNT_Battle;
29	
30		// ==== 战斗参数 ====
31	
32		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Node|Battle")
33		FString BattleMapName;
34	
35		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Node|Battle", meta = (ClampMin = "1", ClampMax = "5"))
36		int32 StarRating = 1;
37	
38		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Node|Battle")
39		bool bCanEscape = true;
40	
41		// 基础金币奖励
42		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Node|Battle")
43		int32 BaseGoldReward = 0;
44	
45		// 基础食物奖励
46		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Node|Battle")
47		int32 BaseFoodReward = 0;
48	
49		// ==== 事件参数 ====
50	
51		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Node|Event")
52		FString EventID;
53	
54		// ==== 城镇参数 ====
55	
56		// 城镇建筑列表字符串（分号分隔）
57		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Node|Town")
58		FString TownBuildingList;
59	
60		// 商店配置 ID
61		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Node|Shop")
62		FName ShopID = NAME_None;
63	
64		// 雇佣市场配置 ID
65		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Node|HireMarket")
66		FName HireMarketID = NAME_None;
67	
68		// ==== 解锁条件 ====
69	
70		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Node")
71		FString PrerequisiteNodeIDs;
72	
73		// ============== 运行时状态 ==============
74	
75		// 是否已触发过（战斗/事件节点首次触发后标记）
76		UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Node|Runtime")
77		bool bHasBeenTriggered = false;
78	
79		// 是否被迷雾覆盖
80		UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Node|Runtime")
81		bool bIsRevealed = false;
82	
83		// ============== 数据转换 ==============
84	
85		// 从 CSV 行数据初始化
86		void InitFromRowData(const FLFPWorldNodeRow& Row);
87	
88		// 导出为 CSV 行数据
89		FLFPWorldNodeRow ExportToRowData() const;
90	
91		// 获取 2D 位置
92		UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "World Node")
93		FVector2D GetPosition2D() const;
94	
95		// 设置 2D 位置
96		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Node")
97		void SetPosition2D(FVector2D NewPos);
98	
99		// ============== 视觉 ==============
100	
101		// 设置节点视觉数据
102		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Node|Visuals")
103		void SetNodeVisualData(ULFPWorldNodeDataAsset* InData);
104	
105		// 根据状态更新精灵显示
106		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Node|Visuals")
107		void UpdateVisualState();
108	
109		// 设置高亮
110		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Node|Visuals")
111		void SetHighlighted(bool bHighlight);
112	
113	protected:
114		// 根组件
115		UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Components")
116		TObjectPtr<USceneComponent> RootSceneComponent;
117	
118		// 节点精灵
119		UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Components")
120		TObjectPtr<UPaperSpriteComponent> NodeSpriteComponent;
121	
122		// 高亮精灵
123		UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Components")
124		TObjectPtr<UPaperSpriteComponent> HighlightSpriteComponent;
125	
126		// 视觉数据资产引用
127		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Node|Visuals")
128		TObjectPtr<ULFPWorldNodeDataAsset> NodeVisualData;
129	};
130

60	
61		// 基础金币奖励
62		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Node|Battle")
63		int32 BaseGoldReward = 0;
64	
65		// 基础食物奖励
66		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Node|Battle")
67		int32 BaseFoodReward = 0;
68	
69		// ==== 事件节点参数 ====
70	
71		// 事件 ID

content.thinking:
**Evaluating teleportation calls**

I’m considering how to handle teleportation. I think I should call the same functions for HandlePostMove and HandlePostArrival, but I'm wondering if "EnterNode" should be automatic. It seems like “节点进入状态” refers to a node's triggered status, so maybe it's best to use the same handling approach for that as well. I want to make sure everything is cohesive in how teleportation functions are structured. Let's explore this further!

**Planning development details**

I need to create a concise document in English, aiming for under 300 words, but it should be around 230-260 Chinese characters for clarity. My plan includes about 8 bullet points to keep things organized.

I want to mention the issue with the SelectedNode: OpenTown doesn't set this to TownNode properly, but OnTownBuildingRequested uses SelectedNode for shop actions. There might be a problem here since the current node might not be selected correctly. 

I think we need to cache CurrentTownNode in PlayerController, using this pointer for town building actions, plus ensure data flows properly from the town node to the UI.**Recommending setup extensions**

I think I need to recommend extending the Setup to accept full building entries or at least teleport target IDs. The simplest approach could be to have the Controller cache `CurrentTownNode` and `CurrentTownTeleportTargets`. Then, the TownWidget would only need to emit `TBT_Teleport`. This should streamline the process and make things easier to manage while ensuring everything functions smoothly. It feels like this adjustment will really help with clarity and efficiency!

content.text:
建议按“数据补齐 -> UI分发 -> Manager执行”三层做最小实现。

1. 数据层  
优先补齐 `ALFPWorldMapNode / FLFPWorldNodeRow` 的城镇建筑明细，让城镇节点能拿到 `FLFPTownBuildingEntry`，至少能为 `TBT_Teleport` 提供 `TeleportTargetNodeIDs`；`TownBuildingList` 继续决定按钮显示，明细只给具体功能用。

2. 控制层  
在 `ALFPWorldMapPlayerController::OpenTown` 缓存 `CurrentTownNode` 与当前城镇的 `FLFPTownBuildingEntry` 列表；`ULFPTownWidget` 仍只负责发出 `OnBuildingRequested(TBT_Teleport)`。  
`OnTownBuildingRequested` 的 `TBT_Teleport` 分支里，从缓存明细取目标节点 ID，解析后传给传送 UI，不让 Widget 直接读地图数据。

3. 传送 UI  
新增一个轻量 `TeleportWidget`（列表/返回/确认），输入为“目标节点 ID 列表 + 当前 Manager/Controller 可解析出的目标显示名”。TownWidget 只作为入口，不承载目标列表。

4. 执行传送  
推荐由 `ALFPWorldMapManager` 新增 `TeleportPlayerToNode(int32 TargetNodeID)` 负责真正更新：  
- 校验目标存在  
- 调用 `ULFPWorldMapPlayerState` 的直达更新接口（不校验边、不加回合）  
- 更新 `CurrentNodeID / VisitedNodeIDs / OnPlayerNodeChanged`  
- 立即移动 Pawn  
- 调 `UpdateFog()`，并复用/拆出 `HandlePostMove()` 处理首次进入状态  
PlayerController 只负责关闭 UI、刷新高亮，默认不要自动 `EnterNode`，避免误进战斗。

5. 蓝图/UMG  
需要：配置 `TownWidgetClass` 继续沿用；新增 `TeleportWidget` 蓝图；世界地图编辑/CSV 需能录入城镇传送目标。

6. 验证  
进入带传送阵的城镇 -> 显示传送按钮 -> 打开目标列表 -> 无效/当前节点禁用 -> 传送后 Pawn/当前位置/迷雾/已访问同步更新且不加回合 -> 退出到战斗再返回后，快照恢复到传送后节点。

- d:/UE_Projects/LFP2D/.claude/worktrees/agent-a26e06c0/Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerController.h
- d:/UE_Projects/LFP2D/.claude/worktrees/agent-a26e06c0/Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapManager.cpp
- d:/UE_Projects/LFP2D/.claude/worktrees/agent-a26e06c0/Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerState.cpp
- d:/UE_Projects/LFP2D/.claude/worktrees/agent-a26e06c0/Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapNode.h
